name: Mixed Berry Dessert Pizza
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------TOPPING----------------------------------
2 cups Mixed berries
1/2 cup Seedless raspberry jam, heated
Blend the ricotta cheese, powdered sugar, almonds, and almond extract. Spread the mixture over the cooled crust, leaving a border around the edges. Top with mixed berries and brush warm raspberry jam on top. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
